entry.title: Re: Not able to see quotation in stock/requirement list app
entry.content:
Hello @KC18 

In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, the configuration of schedule line categories that manage the transfer of requirements is not supported. Therefore, you must either utilize the standard configuration provided by SAP or submit a customer improvement request.

Customer Improvement

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: SAP SD - Error "Define 0010/10/A1 first as a general...
entry.content:
Hello @GabrielBiacotti 

Please do the step wise configuration As shown below:

SPRO - Sales and Distribution - Sales - Sale Documents - Sales Document header - Assign Sales Area Document Types

  1. Combine Sales Organization
  2. Combine Distribution channels
  3. Combine Divisions
  4. Assign Sales Document Types Permitted For Sales Area

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Exclusive tax calculation in Asset retirement with Customer
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

  We are trying to sell the retired fixed asset to customer using the app "Post Retirement (Integrated AR) - With Customer" and we need to calculate exclusive tax. We would like to know how we can calculate the exclusive, though inclusive tax calculation is working well. Please kindly give a guidance to go the process successfully.

Thanks and Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Configuring a Specific BOM Component for Exclusive Use in One Header Material within SAP S/4HANA BOM
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if there is a way to configure a specific component in SAP S/4HANA BOM (Bill of Materials) to be used exclusively in only one header material.

Could you provide detailed steps and settings required to achieve this?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Assignment of incoterm locations in SAP TM
entry.content:
Michael, 

Here is what I did:

  1. Maintained the IncoTerm location
  2. Added IncoTerm location into Sales Order as a first stop/stage. 
  3. FU shows up two stages (all good), 
  4. But, when I try to plan FU, system is only planning up to Stage1.  What could be the reason why system is not planning Stage 2 ( Incoterm location to Customer location). 
  5. BTW, I have stage building rule set to ( 05 Two Active Stages - Type 2) in Logistic Integration Profile config. 

Any help would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: Re: Performance Management data not available on Advanced...
entry.content:
Hi @pedronunes_nf ,

If PM, GM modules are required in Advance reporting, please create a case with Support they will enable from backend

If these modules are not available in Story reporting type, please provide data access permission as mentioned in below link

Permissions Required for Using Story Reports | SAP Help Portal

Regards

Subbu

entry.title: Business Architect Responsibilities for an SAP S/4 Hana Cloud project
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are starting an SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Greenfield project. In order to manage the scope and the time well, what are the meetings, platforms and strategy points that an SAP Business Architect can plan and execute in the explore and design phases?

Your suggestions will help us a lot in planning our project for success from the beginning itself. Thank you in advance.

Best,

PP

Thanks & Regards

Sheena.

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: Hi @Sandra_Rossi, I'm yet to get a formal response from SAP on the case that I created. However, looking at the way SAP has designed the new website- Learning.sap.com, it appears that they are putting up only the 'learninghub' subscription way.

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: Hi @Sandra_Rossi, I'm yet to get a formal response from SAP on the case that I created. However, looking at the way SAP has designed the new website- Learning.sap.com, it appears that they are putting up only the 'learninghub' subscription way. The old website- training.sap was offering only one functionality from last year i.e. buy CER001 and CER006, rest all had been moved to learning.sap. Personally, I feel CER001 and CER006 should continue in the future as well.

entry.title: Re: How to find action log in maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hi,

Activate Business Function LOG_EAM_CI_3.

You should start getting the option "Action Log" under Extras menu.

 

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Upload data from excel in CAP (Node.js)

Hi Kanika

I have followed all the steps  but I got error 404, could you tell me how to fix the error ?

BR

entry.title: Re: Multiple characteristics values for different lengths...
entry.content:
Hi,

For the characteristic definition, check if you have set the value assignment option to "multiple values" in Basic Data tab of the characteristic definition.

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: An error occurred while processing option SAP Solution Manager 7.2 Support Release 2 > SAP Solution
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I encountered an error during the Prerequisites Check step while installing Solution Manager. The error message is as follows. Can you help me resolve this issue

An error occurred while processing option SAP Solution Manager 7.2 Support Release 2 > SAP Solution Manager 7.2 ABAP Support Release 2 > Oracle > Preparations > Prerequisites Check (Last error reported by the step: Package not defined. DETAILS: The package with name SAPINST was requested but this package is not defined in the packages section of the component. SOLUTION: Contact SAP support). You can now:

Choose Retry
to repeat the current step.
Choose Log Files
to get more information about the error.
Stop the option and continue later.
Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/SOLMAN72SR2/SOLMAN72SR2/ABAP/ORA/PREP/PRC.

entry.title: Re: Sales Condition Contract Manual settlement document s...
entry.content: Hi Gauthier Victor,

entry.title: Re: Sales Condition Contract Manual settlement document s...
entry.content: Thanks for your detailed explanation, I am trying to understand the fundamental reason for manual settlement Condition type RENT determined does that offsets with any other condition type as I found REA5 has same vale as in negative sign at the item condition, but secondly when I look at the WR2R_BUSVOL manual settlement amount offsetting the automatic amount is in negative value, what does this mean, can you please help me understand this standard behaviour, thanks in advance. Rafiq

entry.title: Unable to do either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO
entry.content:
Unable to either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO

 

        Following is the detailed step :

 

  1. Created an INTRA STO using ME21n.
  2. Created the replenishment delivery using VL10B.
  3. Created the PGI using VL02N.
  4. Created an STO Proforma Invoice for the same.
  5. In MB5T, system shows me the Stock in Transit. NO GR done till now.
  6. Now, due to mismatch in valuation type in delivery document and STO PO , we are unable to do GR system giving error message   M7043 : Cannot GR Stock Transport Order - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA.
  7. We tried to  GR  by changing batch valuation type still system giving same error .
  8. So we wants to reverse the PGI in VL09  and cancel the delivery document.
  9. Tried to reverse PGI in VL09, system giving error: Message VB610: No data available for these selection criteria.
  10. We have cancel the Proforma Invoice, Now the proforma invoice is showing as cancelled in the document flow.
  11. Again, we tried to reverse PGI in VL09, still system giving error “Message VB610: No data available for these selection criteria.”  We checked in VL09 by removing the selection criteria, there is no delivery number available for Intra STO .

 

             STO PO: 5500023709      Delivery document No: 4020027694

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Error Reverse PGI In VL09:

 

 

thanks ,

Shital

entry.title: Re: How to find action log in maintenance task list
entry.content: Thanks Vijay. I was entering in task list from IA05 so it was not showing, but if we enter from IA06 or IA07 then its being displayed. Yes the business function must be activated

entry.title: Re: How to find action log in maintenance task list
entry.content: Glad to hear that you are able to display the action log.

entry.title: Re: Configuring a Specific BOM Component for Exclusive Us...
entry.content:
Hi,

As per my knowledge it's not available in standard, but you can try by managing authorization group for components in material master, so only authorize person can add component in BOM, before execute tcode CS15 where to use list.

entry.title: Re: Multiple characteristics values for different lengths...
entry.content: I selected multiple values but now I found that I need to select additional values too on the particular characteristics tab. Also I need to add values in characteristics value tab. They can only be selected not types on the Linear data tab

entry.title: How to update data in custom facet with the use of data workbench C4C?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Good Morning!!!

I have created a custom facet called "PO Details" in Opportunity BO. In that facet there are 4 columns where  end users need to fill PO details manually. Now they have 100 or more than 100 Opportunities where they need to fill the data in custom facet, so they want these data will be filled automatically by uploading excel sheet in PO details facet.

Is it possible, if we can upload excel sheet in custom facet with the updated data in sheet and based on that data, details updated in dedicated columns. Can we do this with the help of data workbench in c4c? If yes, then please guide with the steps.

Thank you!!

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public EditionでAPI連携で合計実際原価を反映させる方法について
entry.content:
APIは"Production Order Confirmation"を使用し、原価情報をPOSTしたいと考えています。POSTは

POST
/ProdnOrdConf2
でしています。

指図原価詳細アプリから指図原価を確認すると、API連携でデータをポストした指図のみ合計実際原価に値が入らず0表示されてしまいます。

SAPアプリ内から指図確認した指図に関しては合計実際原価に値が入っているため、API連携では合計実際原価に値をそもそも入れることができないのか、何かAPI連携時に必要なデータを飛ばしていないことが原因だと考えています。

原因がわかる方がいましたらご教授いただければ幸いです。

よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Re: Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee...
entry.content: Hi Kaiwen, Suggest you check below documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/25d820f179854df1ac53c0dd50fb1c12.html Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP DMS with SAP Cloud Solutions (C4C, ari...
entry.content:
Hello,

the only solution we found to achieve this is to make use of a "Cloud attachment storage connector" that is able to manage attachments of various cloud solutions (C4C is one of them) and to store them into many types of content / archive servers, on premise or cloud.

This connector is provided by Znk under the name YAC for SaaS.

entry.title: Issue in SAP generative AI Hub python SDK.
entry.content:
While using the sap generative ai hub python sdk to utilize the AI models like GPT 4o, there seems to be an issue regarding the calls. I have utilized the API calls in a loop such that mutiple calls are made one after the other, but the issue I face is that suddenly after some calls, the application just get stuck at fetching the output results. And the reason is unclear as its just random when this happens. Seems no error in the code as there are no exceptions raised as well. It just stops fetching at any random point in the loop. Its true when using embedding models as well. I did go through the documentation for the SDK but found nothing relevant. A help would be appreciated. The application is hosted in SAP BTP cloud foundry environment

 Python   #SAPGenerativeAIHubSDk #SAPAICORE

entry.title: Re: Custom domains for BTP CloudFoundry applications
entry.content:
Great tutorial

FYI:  certbot has discontinued support for Windows as of February 2024 

It means install by exe file (https://github.com/certbot/certbot/releases/download/v3.0.1/certbot-beta-installer-win_amd64_signed.exe) not support anymore

No worries, for the window can easily be installed by Python (means must install Python before)

Command to install certbot:

python -m pip install certbot

and after that, you can also install plugins

python -m pip install certbot-dns-desec

or

python -m pip install certbot-dns-rfc2136

entry.title: Re: Using Document Management as a Content Repository with SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Vikram,

I try to connect a local third-party repository followed CMIS Protocol with BTP DMS, a step which I have finished, and I need to change the repository's backend from its origin one to S4/HANA system.

When executing the fifth step, I fail to get a successful report and the errors are like that:  "sapbo:SourcingProjectQuotation
Not supported!
sapbo:SourcingProjectQuotationItem
Not supported!

Type is unsupported in query: sapbo:BusinessObjectType
An error occurred while updating the properties into SAP tables".

I have searched for a long time and still don't get any proper answer. I wonder if you could give any help for me. Thank you in advance.😄

Best wishes,

Kitty

Could you kindly assist us in diagnosing and resolving this issue, or provide guidance on the next steps we should take? Your support would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your time and assistance. We look forward to your help in resolving this matter.

Sushma.

yes, we can change in below path

entry.title: Re: Brownfield Conversion from EHS Product Safety (ECC) t...
entry.content: Hi CHristoph,

entry.title: Re: Brownfield Conversion from EHS Product Safety (ECC) t...
entry.content:
Hi Christoph,

thank you for your answer. I am actually from a service provider company.

Since for Product compliance it is not easy to find all information, I posted the question here in hope to gain more insight. I want to make sure that I do not forget anything so that the conversion will go smoothly. 

- I have checked all Simplification items for Product Compliance Classic. The customer is not affected from functionalities which are discontinued in S/4

- As far as I understood, in a brownfield conversion the master data will be copied from the ECC system to the S/4 System. If there are master data which cannot be copied and has to be migrated manually, then I would really appreciate if you could list them here

- In terms of activites to be done before and after the conversion I have only found this in the SAP Notes: the activities for the conversion of the SDS Receiver in ECC to Business Partner in S/4. (SAP Note 2267461)

If you know are aware of more conversion activites, please share them here. 

Thank you in advance

Duc

entry.title: Re: DataAction copy step
entry.content: How dynamic would you like it to be? What parameter should user input ?

entry.title: KSII actual activity price calculation shows only fixed price, variable price has no value.
entry.content:
KSII actual activity price calculation shows only fixed price, variable price has no value.

Operation procedure
1. Operation price is maintained through KP26.
For example, operation price ACT001. Fixed price 1, variable price 2
2, the end of the operation price split KSS2
3, the actual operation price calculation KSII, then see the operation price only fixed price, no variable price.
4. The actual price seen by KSBT is fixed, and the planned price is realistic and variable, as shown in the figure below

entry.title: Re: How to write "IF THEN ELSE" statement with BEX query...
entry.content:
Hi tek_ib,

you have to use numeric values only for if - then conditions in SAC and "Credit memo" is a string so this will not work.
with an import connection you could simply create a calculated dimension. For BW live this is not yet available - please vote here. However, your BW team could introduce a new navigation characteristic which is based on your keyfigure. then you could define ranges in BW and which text should be shown for them.

if-then-else in general:
if you write 'if' (without ' ') into calculation editor SAC's auto-completion will create the needed structure:

Now you simply start with the first two numbers of measure ID '00' and SAC will present to you all available measures from your query:

you could also use the description of your measure:

this methods will prevent typos.
BR
Edgar

entry.title: Re: STORIES reports from a performance template
entry.content:
Hi @IngridOsorio ,

As of Standard Story templates are not available for Performance and Goal Management related modules

Regards,

Subbu

entry.title: Add mappings is not working in SAP HANA Cloud Instance
entry.content:
Hi,
From the past 1 week, i am getting an error while adding the mappings. But, earlier it was working.
I am only able to map the cloud foundry environment that too while creating the HANA Cloud Instance.
After the creation of HANA Cloud Instance, if i try to map any environment whether Kyma or Cloud Foundry or both, it is showing the below error.
I have created the Hana Cloud Database Instance from Hana Cloud tools and i am working on trial account.

Version
2024.40.8 (QRC 4/2024)
Runtime Environment
Other Environments

Please help me to resolve this issue.

Best Regards,
Abhinav

is it possible to reduce the VM size?

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content:
Dear all,

I'm struggling to create a custom task for an offboarding program, I need a field named "Assigned To" where I need to specify the employee that must complete that task (not group as specified above). However I don't manage to get the required outcome.

Any thoughts, please?

Thanks!

Best regards,

Amal

entry.title: Re: custom functions stopped working when upgrading to BI4.3
entry.content:
Hi,

in our case it turned out that when releasing 4.3 SAP had updated the libraries/headers (boplatform.h, ibovariant.h). In consequence, for the functions to work it was neccessary to recompile the source code for the functions (.cpp -> .dll) using updated headers.

entry.title: Re: Job Req reportable fields in Story
entry.content:
Hi @GCR ,

These fields are reportable through story report

related screenshot is attached

Regards,

Subbu

entry.title: Re: Brownfield Conversion from EHS Product Safety (ECC) to S/4HANA Product Compliance Classic
entry.content:
Hello

you have used the term/sentence "Since for Product compliance it is not easy to find all information, I posted the question here in hope to gain more insight. I want to make sure that I do not forget anything so that the conversion will go smoothly. "

This is not a "good story". The issue is the term "Product Compliance". This term is misleading (or can be misleading).

In R/3 you are using EHS Classic. try to avoid to use the term "product compliance" (there are many conflicts to list if needed).

in S/4 you can use EHS classic or you can use  the new solution called: "Product Compliance" if you believe that the current version satisfies your needs.

I assume: You still will se EHS classic in S/4.

Honestly It is not a good idea only to "migrate" with out the check of: can i "improve/simplify etc." processes. But this depends on your project scope...

Anyhow: i wish you the best or your project

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Which tools do you use for CSV files?
entry.content:
Hello,

To edit and view these CSV files, we use Excel, but it's true that each time we have to juggle with the American and European formats in the odinator's configuration panel to adjust the parameters. I don't have any other solutions! But if anyone has an answer, I'd be interested too.

Bests regards.

entry.title: CAP-JAVA implementation for Authorization Management Service (AMS)
entry.content:
Basic concept of AMS

To learn the basic concept of AMS, like what is Authorization Management Service (AMS), how it works and what is the Policy, you can refer to the article writen by @kevin_li .

Authorization Management Service in SAP Cloud Identity Service 

This Blog is specifically to introduce one of the implementation of AMS in our project, that is, how CAP-JAVA based application integrate with AMS.

General dev flow

Assume that you already have a fine run CAP-JAVA application, you can simply follow this steps to integrate AMS to your application:

Make sure you are using the latest version of these dependencies.

First include the ams dependency in your package.json.

  "devDependencies": {
    "@sap/ams-dev": "^2"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^8.6.0"
  },

 Run the following command to add AMS to your project.

npm i
cds add ias
cds add ams

It automatically add the related dependencies in your srv/pom.xml, make sure you are using the latest version. (**At least >= 2.0.0**)

<sap.cloud.security.ams.version>2.0.0</sap.cloud.security.ams.version>

If you are using DwC(if you don't use it, skip this step), and you have included the util-cap of dwc library in your project, please exclude the following dependency from it, Then add the util-btp-security-lib-integration.

    <!-- Deploy with Confidence -->
    <dependency>
      <groupId>com.sap.dwc</groupId>
      <artifactId>util-cap</artifactId>
      <version>${dwc.version}</version>
      <exclusions>
        <exclusion>
          <groupId>com.sap.dwc</groupId>
          <artifactId>util-mutual-authentication</artifactId>
        </exclusion>
      </exclusions>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>com.sap.dwc</groupId>
      <artifactId>util-btp-security-lib-integration</artifactId>
      <version>${dwc.version}</version>
    </dependency>

This util-btp-security-lib-integration provides a way to modify the name of the token related HTTP headers for the requests to adapt the mechanism of Jupiter. You need to add a configuration for the Web Security like below.

@Configuration
@EnableWebSecurity
@Profile("cloud")
@Order(1)
@PropertySource(factory = IdentityServicesPropertySourceFactory.class, ignoreResourceNotFound = true, value = {""})
public class ActuatorSecurityConfiguration {
  @Autowired
  @Qualifier("dwcJwtDecoder")
  JwtDecoder dwcJwtDecoder;

  @Bean
  public SecurityFilterChain securityFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
    // Expose endpoint for service availability (/actuator/health/**) and
    // DwC Euporie (/euporie-registration) publicly without requiring any authentication.
    http.authorizeHttpRequests(requests -> requests
        .requestMatchers("/actuator/health/**").permitAll()
        .requestMatchers("/euporie-registration").permitAll()
        .anyRequest().authenticated())
      .oauth2ResourceServer(
        oauth2 -> oauth2.jwt(jwt -> jwt
          .decoder(dwcJwtDecoder)));
    return http.build();
  }
}

Define the request you want/don't want the authentication.

Authorization Model Design

Follow the guide provided by CAP, you can use annotations to restrict the authorization of APIs and Entities.

Official guideline by cloud-authorization-client-library-java gives a very detailed information of how to handle it.

Authorization Management Service Support for CAP Java Applications 

Assign and check your policy

Again, Li's article gives a very general introduction of how to do this.

Authorization Management Service in SAP Cloud Identity Service 

Reference

Authorization Management Service Support for CAP Java Applications 

AMS Official Document 

CAP JAVA AMS Example Code 

AMS DwC Integration Tool Library 

AMS CAP Support Library

entry.title: Re: An error occurred while processing option SAP Solution Manager 7.2 Support Release 2 > SAP So
entry.content:
Please check if your system have the necessary ORACLE requisites fulfilled: https://docs.oracle.com/en/database/oracle/oracle-database/19/ladbi/supported-suse-linux-enterprise-server-15-distributions-for-x86-64.html

Also, check SAP notes 2578899 - SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15: Installation Note - SAP for Me, 3004719 - ORA-03113 happens at the step create database in SWPM - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Exam Attempt
entry.content:
Hi @nsairam 
You need to select a region

Then you should see the booking information and you should be able to start the purchasing process.
Kind regrads
Margit

entry.title: Error in PGR via Inbound Delivery in S4 HANA for InterCompany Advance STO Process
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am encountering an issue while performing Post Goods Receipt (PGR) via inbound delivery using transaction VL32N in the InterCompany Advanced Stock Transport Order (STO) process in S4 HANA. The error message I receive is:

"No goods receipt possible for purchasing document 4500001039 10" (Message No. M7036).

Attached are the screenshots of the error for your reference. Could you please assist me in resolving this?

Thank you

Regards

Nirjhar

entry.title: Re: Issues in extracting oracle table where security is b...
entry.content: In your dataflow, use the Pre-load Command feature in the source Oracle table to execute your procedure.

entry.title: Re: Excel Report and Interactive Analysis Designer is inactive
entry.content: Please try to initialised the database from the SLD ---- Service --- Analytics Platform.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: for Inbound Delivery PGR wont we use VL32N instead of VL02N as you mentioned in your post?

entry.title: Re: RAP and custom action buttons - Invisible instead of disabled ?
entry.content: Have you looked into this topic again to date and do you now know more? regards Lars

entry.title: Re: ABWKONTI - Absence Quota output table data is incorrect
entry.content: Hi , Please provide the screenshot of the selection rule including Base entitlement , in my past experience duplication is due to the mismatch between the accrual period and base entitlement. Since you mentioned this works for periods before and after 2026 check if there are any changes to rules.

entry.title: Re: Unable to do either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO
entry.content:
Dear vivek ,

As there in vendor master GI based invoice verification field is already ticked . so while creating PO GI based GR field gets ticked marked, But User  did mistake, he  removed tick and enter valuation type  (Domestic) manually in PO  , while doing delivery automatic batch determination valuation type is import  , we are not able do GR due mismatch in valuation type.

please suggest solution ,

thanks ,

Shital

I have 3 custom ones, and my new field combination only appears in one of them

entry.title: Facing issues with adding SVG format files in SAP MDK 24.11
entry.content:
Hi all,

I was working on a task to put the SAP Logo at the left side on the top action bar in our team's mobile app. I was trying to use put an SAP Logo in SVG format so as to not compromise on pixel quality as well as make the most out of MDK 24.11's updates. However, when I used the attached SVG file below in our app, it doesn't show up appropriately in the app as you guys can see in the screenshot. Can anyone help me out in this?


{
	"Caption": "Dashboard Test",
	"PrefersLargeCaption": true,
	"Controls": [
		{
			"_Name": "SectionedDashboardTable",
			"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "Target": "/Rex/Rules/Dashboard/TargetForDashboard.js",
            "Section": "/Rex/Rules/Dashboard/GetDashboardSection.js"
		}
	],
	"ActionBar": {
		"Logo": "/Rex/Images/SAP-Logo.svg",
    	"Items": [

			{
			"_Name": "ProfileR",
			"Icon": "/Rex/Rules/GetProfilePicture.js",
			"IconText": "",
			"Position": "Right",
			"IsIconCircular": true,
			  "OnPress": {
				"Name": "/Rex/Actions/CommonNavTo.action",
				"Properties": {
						"PageToOpen": "/Rex/Pages/Profile.page",
						"ModalPage": true
						}
			}
		}
		],
		"_Name": "dashboardActionItems",
		"_Type": "Control.Type.ActionBar"
  	},
	"_Name": "Dashboard",
	"OnResume": "/Rex/Rules/Details/RedrawPageIfRequired.js",
	"OnReturning": "/Rex/Rules/Details/RedrawPageIfRequired.js",
	"OnCustomEventDataReceived":"/Rex/Rules/Details/RedrawPageIfRequired.js",
	"_Type": "Page",
	"PullDown": {
		"OnPulledDown": "/Rex/Actions/Service/SyncStartedMessage.action"
	}
}

entry.title: Re: Add mappings is not working in SAP HANA Cloud Instance

entry.title: Re: Email triggered by SOST adds a prefix to link
entry.content: Error because of the invalid space at the end of the URL?

entry.title: Integrated Container Tracking Using SAP Enterprise Asset Management and Transportation Management
entry.content:
In the transportation industry, it is common for companies to own and operate transportation units, such as ocean containers, and to require system support to track both their location and condition. While these containers represent a single physical object in the real world, SAP treats them as multiple objects, primarily the Serialized Asset or Equipment in SAP Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) and the Resource in SAP Transportation Management (TM). This dual representation introduces complexity in ensuring synchronization across business processes.

Understanding SAP EAM and SAP TM

Both part of SAP S4/HANA, Enterprise Asset Management is designed to manage the complete lifecycle of physical assets within a company. It includes features for procurement, maintenance, performance monitoring, and limited tracking capabilities. Conversely, SAP Transportation Management focuses on transportation planning, load optimization, and communication with external subcontractors, such as ocean liners. Simplified, EAM is most applicable when containers are within the company’s premises, whereas TM is utilized when containers are in transit.

Many customers request functionality that spans both EAM and TM, necessitating the integration of these objects in SAP. While the optimal solution varies based on specific customer requirements, this blog illustrates how such integration can be achieved.

Integration Example: Tracking Containers in Stock and in Transit

In this example, the customer requires visibility into container locations both in stock and during transit, therefore the container need to be administratively added to the shipment. This is achieved by packing the materials into the container using Handling Unit Management functionality where the packing material (the container) is added as a line item on the Delivery:

Since the container is a serialized material, a serial number must also be assigned. Using the BIC code as the serial number, would be a consideration in this example.

When TM delivery based integration is active, the Freight Unit Building Rule (configuration explained later in this blog) automatically creates a Container Unit document in TM. This links the serialized container (asset / equipment) in the delivery to the TM Container Unit document, as illustrated below:

  • Top Line: The TM Container Unit document, which supports planning and execution in TM and can be used for freight bookings and communication with ocean carriers.
  • Middle Line: The Handling Unit representing the container during packing in the delivery. This establishes the connection between the Equipment/Serialized Material.
  • Bottom Line: The materials that need to be shipped.

When a Goods Issue is posted for the delivery, the container is included and leaves the issuing storage location. Upon posting Goods Receipt at the receiving storage location, the serialized container is added to the stock of the receiving location. This ensures the connection between SAP asset or equipment and the physical container via the Handling Unit, fulfilling the on-premise tracking requirements.

However, it is worth noting that the serial number assigned to the container in the delivery is not passed on to the corresponding container number in the TM Container Unit document. This limitation is inherent to the system and may require a small additional development.

Key Customization Settings

The following customization settings are critical for this integration:

1. Delivery Type Customization: Specific settings are configured in delivery type customization to include containers as packing materials in the delivery.

2. Freight Unit Building Rule: In this set up each container type has its own Freight Unit Building Rule, ensuring the correct corresponding Container Unit document is created based on predefined conditions.

In this example, the Container unit document is created directly in the FUBR, which would be most suitable for FCL scenarios. If consolidation by Freight units would be required, the same could be achieved with the example above, however manual steps would be required to achieve the same packing constellation in the delivery as well as in TM.

entry.title: Map Operation Activity to specific Recourse in SAP DMC
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am looking for a solution where i can map operation activity to a particular resource in SAM DMC. 

For Ex - If we have a production order with 3 operation activities (10,20 and 30) and also we have 3 different resources (A, B and C). all these 3 resources are mapped to one work center. 

Now while using Work Center POD , if i select resource as A, then only operation 10 should come in the work list and operator can work only with 10 operation. 

Same if i select resource as B, then only operation 20 should come in the work list and operator can work only with 20 operation. 

Note  - We are using Simultaneous Group to run any operation at any sequence. 

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Operation Activity filter in Work Center POD
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any option to ass filter as Operation Activity in Work Center POD? I dont see any configuration for the same apart from SFC / Work Center / Resource filter.

 

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Where can I learn the key process of SAP Treasury Management in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Discovering SAP Treasury Management in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
Upon completing this learning journey, business users, consultants, and other interested learners will gain a comprehensive understanding of SAP S/4HANA's full range of capabilities and business benefits for efficient Treasury operations. Building on this foundational knowledge, you will explore SAP's extensive integration capabilities with both SAP and non-SAP systems, the implementation strategy, and the key organizational changes that need to be addressed when adopting S/4HANA for Treasury management. Ultimately, you will be well-equipped to utilize S/4HANA's robust tools to enhance your organization's Treasury operations and financial management processes.

Learning objectives

  • Outline common challenges in Treasury, explain process improvements and efficiencies for users and organizations that result from implementing S/4HANA, such as streamlining the Treasury workflow
  • Discover key business benefits, use cases and scenarios for using Cash Management, Multi-Bank Connectivity, Treasury Risk Management, Market Data Management, Trading Platform integration and Advanced Payment Management in SAP S/4HANA
  • Explore SAP Business AI capabilities of Treasury in SAP S/4HANA

Prerequisites

  • A fundamental understanding of Treasury business processes

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 
I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Mixed languages in NWBC
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we imported a language package for Spanish in our system. It has been available for log on using SAP GUI but when accessing using NWBC, translations are mixed between Spanish, English, and German.

This issue happens in the development system. Here are the steps we followed when installing the Spanish language. Hoping you could look over it and check if we missed anything.

1.) Since Spanish is already initially defined in the system, we set the supplementary language as English.
2) We proceeded with the importation of Language packs in the system to all clients.
3) Wait for the transport to finish successfully.
4) Check if Spanish is available for log on.

Wondering if this is caused by difference in supplementation language (EN) and secondary language (DE)? Any help is appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: The ABAP Test Cockpit Checks for SAP TM
entry.content: Hi @lucian_lidy , unfortunately I cannot see a downport yet. Can you check, please?

entry.title: Re: Billing Document Reprint for Different Parties
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, you can reprint billing documents and customize the output to display different headings for each copy intended for various parties. To achieve this, follow these general steps:

1. **Copy and Customize the Standard Form Template:**
- Begin by copying a standard billing document form template that closely matches your requirements.
- Customize this copied template to include specific headings such as "Original for Recipient", "Duplicate for Transporter", "Triplicate for Supplier", and "Customer Acknowledgement".

2. **Utilize Output Control:**
- Configure the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Output Control settings to manage the printing sequences and customize which headings appear on each copy.
- Ensure that in your configuration, you specify the conditions or rules that determine which template is printed for each party.

3. **Create Multiple Output Types:**
- In your configuration, you might also define different output types for each version of the document if required.
- Assign different output types or assignments to these forms to distinguish between types of reprints.

4. **Watermark for Duplicates:**
- Make use of the duplicate printing functionality to include distinct identifiers or watermarks on the copied forms if needed. This will help you ensure compliance and clarity for each recipient.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Where can I start learning the business processes from the contract accounting area?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Implementing SAP Financial Contract Accounting learning journey.

Overview
This Learning Journey provides an overview of the features of SAP Financial Contract Accounting (FI-CA) in the context of the SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management solution (BRIM).

Learning objectives
After completing this intermediate level learning journey, Implementation Consultants will understand the most important business processes from the contract accounting area that are represented in the system. Also they will understand the technical data context of contract accounts subledger and its integration into FI general ledger accounting.

Prerequisites

  • Discovering the capabilities of SAP Solutions for Quote-to-Cash Management private cloud (BRIM) for Business User

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Which tools do you use for CSV files?
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use OpenOffice Calc, which is a free tool and works very well with CSV files.

Best regards,

Hi,

You can go to Home --> Company Info --> Directory --> Advanced Search

Then, select the desired Company and hit Search:

Result:

Best regards.

entry.title: mass transfer material to material in same bin in WM
entry.content:
hello all

is it possible to transfer material to material (Mvt 309) in the same storage type/bin, without having to choose it in LT06?

if I understand correctly, I do MB1B (where I cannot choose storage type/bin) with quantity and materials, after which I do LT06 in which I create a TO but I must choose the storage type.

last step LT12

 

I am trying to skip the choosing of the storage type and have the system determine source = destination storage type/bin.

is this possible?

EDIT: I have already set "post to same bin" in customizing movement types but it does not help

entry.title: Re: Add mappings is not working in SAP HANA Cloud Instance

Also, i can see this error, are they interlinked?

entry.title: Unlock S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Why Key Users are Crucial in Moving from Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Introduction

Transitioning from SAP Business ByDesign to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is more than a technical upgrade; it requires a strategic shift and a true Cloud Mindset. This blog post draws from our key user real-world experiences and their learnings and feedback, showing how the success of this journey hinges on the drive of these critical team members.

How to Select Key Users

  • Embrace Best Practices: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is about adopting SAP’s best practices, so don’t limit your search to Businsess ByDesign experts, find individuals who understand the limitations of the Business ByDesign, the reasons for the move and are genuinely committed to embracing the Cloud Mindset and its inherent best practices.
  • Understand the “Why”: Select individuals who understand the underlying business needs not just the business process as it is implemented, they need to be able to articulate the why behind their work.
  • Strong Communicators: Key users are the bridge between the project team and end-users, they must be able to clearly explain the benefits of adopting new business processes and address any concerns.

Where are Key Users vital in transition?

  • Championing Change: Involved from the start, key users leverage their understanding of both Business ByDesign and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (see “Training and Support” below) to effectively communicate the changes and benefits to their teams. They can bridge the gap by relating new processes to familiar Business ByDesign concepts, making them powerful advocates for change.
  • Business Process Review: During the Fit-to-Standard workshops in the Explore phase, key users play a crucial role in evaluating S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition's capabilities against current Business ByDesign processes. They champion the adoption of standard S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition processes, helping determine the optimal configurations and identify any genuine gaps.
  • Training and Support: As the first line of training and support, key users leverage their dual-system experience to anticipate user questions and tailor training effectively. They are often designated as Support or Influence key users, liaising directly with SAP and need comprehensive training on the SAP Activate methodology and relevant business process content, available on SAP Learning.
  • Beyond implementation: The most valuable feedback we receive comes from key users. Their feedback and insights and along with those gathered from the Influence Request Portal, are used to improve implementation processes and help shape future product releases.

Key User involvement from the start 

We can already see the significant involvement required of the key users and consequently the demands placed upon them, this is not without a price and gives rise to several challenges.

The Challenges of Key User Involvement

  • Time Commitment & Overburdening Key Users: Key users, often already stretched due to their expertise, are now tasked with learning a new system, participating in workshops and supporting their teams. Underestimating this time commitment is a major pitfall and a common reason for project delays. They have the potential to significantly influence and optimise business processes, but being time poor can mean missed opportunities. We’ve seen several delays in go-lives directly attributable to both key user availability and resistance to change, the next point.
  • Resistance to Change: Change is inherently disruptive. Some key users may resist S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition best practice due to a perceived loss of control, especially if they were deeply involved in customising Business ByDesign in the past. They may fear that their expertise will be undermined or be wary due to negative experiences with past implementations, so this resistance needs to be addressed proactively for a successful transition.

Overcoming the Challenges

  • Address Resistance and Involve Key Users Early: Acknowledge potential resistance and address it head-on, importantly review past implementation projects, to understand the root cause of any friction and identify lessons learned. This allows you to tailor the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation to avoid repeating past mistakes., Build trust and demonstrate that you are listening to concerns, SAP’s Activate methodology recommends key-user involvement from the Discover phase onwards and this early engagement allows them to contribute to requirements gathering and process design. We had an instance where it was the customer’s Project Manager resisting key user early involvement, including them only from the fit-to-standard workshops, aiming to avoid consuming too much of their time. This backfired and this key part of the Explore phase became derailed as key users scrambled to understand the reasons scope items were selected (or not) and even why the transition itself was the best option.
  • Proper Selection and Training: Select key users with strong communication skills, a deep understanding of business needs and a willingness to embrace and evangelise change. We have also seen great success where 2-3 users are appointed per process, with one in the lead, this not only helps lighten the load, but also a valuable forum for discussion.  The key users were also selected from different but related departments, resulting in a fresh perspective, challenging existing processes and mindset and seeing some truly innovative ideas. Successful transition projects are where we see time and budget allocated to train key users using SAP Activate’s accelerators and in particular learning journeys on SAP Learning.

 Conclusion

Key users are vital to a successful transition from Business ByDesign to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. When you invest in their selection, training, and support, you're not just implementing software; you're building a team that can truly own the change.

What are your experiences with key user involvement in implementations? Share your thoughts in the comments below. And if you'd like to learn more about how our customers have successfully transitioned please see my other blog and also hear from customers themselves in this podcasts.

Please also see my other blog: Key Success Factors for Transition from SAP Business ByDesign  to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Episode 103: SAP Customer Transitioning Experience: SAP Business ByDesign to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Publi...

Episode 111: Transitioning from SAP Business ByDesign to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: After Go-...

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Learning System options for practice
entry.content:
Hi @LeahL 
If you are enrolled in the self-paced learning, there is no demo instance. Demo Instances are only available for virtual SAP Live Class (VLC) sessions.
Kind regards
Margit
